title: Getting Dressed Up with Pale Violet
excerpt: Though I am usually on the more casual side in my day-to-day attire, I love any excuse to get dressed up. A few weeks ago, I attended a sample sale downtown at the Pale Violet headquarters. I was lucky enough…
body:
Though I am usually on the more casual side in my day-to-day attire, I love any excuse to get dressed up. A few weeks ago, I attended a sample sale downtown at the Pale Violet headquarters. I was lucky enough to have stumbled into their shop back in January where I found THE perfect dress to wear to the Clippers game. That dress happens to be on sale right now. They no longer have a storefront, but lucky for you all, they have just launched their brand new website.

Photos by Jamie Waters

At the sample sale, I picked up the dress featured in these photos and this one too. And I got these shorts that I have been wearing a lot these days. 

I'm pretty much obsessed with their feminine and fun selections that are unique and carefully curated by the owner, Julia. She's been kind enough to extend a 20% storewide discount for you lovely readers! Now through July 15, 2015 use the code TANGERINE for 20% off at Pale Violet!
